portfolio_rationale: XOM earns the top weight due to the cleanest technical picture in the universe — all six technical indicators bullish with no bearish factors and a 0.9 technical confidence — combined with solid fundamentals and consistent bullish signals. AMZN and GOOGL are both high-quality businesses with bullish judge decisions but carry meaningful overbought risk (RSI 80+ and 88+ respectively), warranting meaningful but reduced allocations. AAPL and BRK.B receive small allocations given weak momentum/bearish technical signals, while LLY is excluded entirely due to its neutral judge signal.

XOM.reason: Cleanest bull case with all six technical indicators positive, no bearish technical factors, 0.9 technical confidence, and solid fundamental cash flows — the strongest risk/reward in the universe this week.

AMZN.reason: Strong fundamentals and positive technical momentum across most indicators, but RSI at 80.7 signals overbought conditions that cap conviction relative to XOM.

GOOGL.reason: Excellent fundamentals (ROE 36%, strong liquidity) and bullish technical momentum, but RSI at 88.5 is the most extreme overbought reading in the universe, creating near-term pullback risk.

AAPL.reason: Strong fundamentals and deeply oversold RSI (21.9) offer rebound potential, but all momentum indicators are bearish and price is below key moving averages, limiting near-term conviction.

BRK.B.reason: Solid operating profitability and macro support, but the technical analyst issued a bearish signal and litigious news risk adds uncertainty, warranting only a small allocation.

LLY.reason: Judge signal is neutral (0.5 confidence) with recurring risk flags across multiple weeks — excluded from portfolio per policy of zero weight for non-bullish judge signals.
